recommended_read.title: Nat Bullard's Decarbonization deck 2026

recommended_listen.title: The brutal truth about net zero and how to vanquish climate populists, with Dieter Helm
recommended_listen.description: Building on his 2017 cost of energy review, Prof. Dieter Helm discusses the challenges of the UK's national energy strategy.
